ab: mi’o poha’o ne taseona ne te’o toatmopsʉ.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: me mi’o uhune ’oyonatmpsʉ, os’o ta’payo’a hafa ’o tvotposʉa.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: uk’a ci os’o hafa ci macucuma.
en: I didn’t bring anything with me.

ab: mo seo’lʉa no tmopsʉ, mimia iepoepohʉ baito to tposʉ ’o mimia tmepoepohʉ.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: sio’lʉa no hʉsvʉta, yuevaha to mimia tmaepoepohʉ ’o ’oyomza tmopsʉ’u ho ’oyomza smaofsusu.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: mi’uni a’o to le’aotothomʉ ho yainca, “takocula yue’ou’ou no ta’esi, ’ote na’la ’aoko poha’o!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, “Wake up earlier next time and don’t be late again!”
